section: Fundamentals of Sociology, Science, and Research

topics.title: Sociology - The Discipline
subtopics: Modernity and social changes in Europe and emergence of Sociology.
Scope of the subject and comparison with other social sciences.

topics.title: Sociology as Science
subtopics: Major theoretical strands of research methodology.

topics.title: Research Methods and Analysis
subtopics: Variables, sampling, hypothesis, reliability, and validity.

topics.title: Sociological Thinkers
subtopics: Karl Marx - Historical materialism, mode of production, alienation, class struggle.
Emile Durkheim - Division of labour, social fact, suicide, religion and society.
Max Weber - Social action, ideal types, authority, bureaucracy, protestant ethic and the spirit of capitalism.
Talcott Parsons - Social system, pattern variables.
Robert K. Merton - Latent and manifest functions, conformity and deviance, reference groups.

topics.title: Stratification and Mobility
subtopics: Concepts - equality, inequality, hierarchy, exclusion, poverty, and deprivation.
Theories of social stratification - Structural functionalist theory, Marxist theory, Weberian theory.
Dimensions - Social stratification of class, status groups, gender, ethnicity and race.
Social mobility - open and closed systems, types of mobility, sources and causes of mobility.

topics.title: Works and Economic Life
subtopics: Social organization of work in different types of society - slave society, feudal society, industrial capitalist society.
Formal and informal organization of work.

topics.title: Politics and Society
subtopics: Power elite, bureaucracy, pressure groups and political parties.
Nation, state, citizenship, democracy, civil society, ideology.
Protest, agitation, social movements, collective action, revolution.

topics.title: Religion and Society
subtopics: Types of religious practices: animism, monism, pluralism, sects, cults.
Religion in modern society: religion and science, secularization, religious revivalism, fundamentalism.

topics.title: Systems of Kinship
subtopics: Patriarchy and sexual division of labour.

topics.title: Perspectives on the Study of Indian Society
Impact of Colonial Rule on Indian Society
subtopics: Protests and movements during the colonial period.

topics.title: Rural, Agrarian Structure and Caste System
subtopics: Rural and Agrarian Social Structure: The idea of Indian village and village studies.
Agrarian social structure— evolution of land tenure system, land reforms.
Caste System: Perspectives on the study of caste systems (G. S. Ghurye, M. N. Srinivas, Louis Dumont, Andre Beteille).

topics.title: Tribal Communities and Social Classes
subtopics: Tribal Communities in India: Definitional problems; Geographical spread.
Colonial policies and tribes; Issues of integration and autonomy.
Social Classes in India: Agrarian class structure; Industrial class structure; Middle classes in India.

topics.title: Systems of Kinship and Religion in India
subtopics: Systems of Kinship in India: Lineage and descent in India; Types of kinship systems.
Family and marriage in India; Household dimensions of the family; Patriarchy, entitlements, and sexual division of labour.
Religion and Society: Religious communities in India; Problems of religious minorities.

section: Social Changes in India: Transformations and Urbanisation

topics.title: Visions of Social Change in India
subtopics: Idea of development planning and mixed economy.

topics.title: Rural and Agrarian Transformation in India
subtopics: Programmes of rural development, Community Development Programme, cooperatives, poverty alleviation schemes.
Changing modes of production in Indian agriculture.
Problems of rural labour, bondage, migration.

topics.title: Industrialization and Urbanisation in India
subtopics: Evolution of modern industry in India.
Growth of urban settlements in India.
Working class: structure, growth, class mobilization.
Slums and deprivation in urban areas.

section: Social Changes in India: Politics, Movements, and Challenges

topics.title: Politics and Society
subtopics: Political parties, pressure groups, social and political elite.

topics.title: Population Dynamics
subtopics: Population size, growth, composition and distribution.
Components of population growth: birth, death, migration.
Emerging issues: ageing, sex ratios, child and infant mortality, reproductive health.

topics.title: Challenges of Social Transformation
subtopics: Crisis of development: displacement, environmental problems and sustainability.
